Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for motion of Compromise of claim of Minor Simonne Alden.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:13:25 a.m. and concluding at 10:21:36 a.m.(D505)

Julia Wobbe, Esq. representing Guardian Ad litem April Alden via Zoom Video Conference.
Guardian Ad Litem April Alden was sworn and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Claimant Simonne Alden is present but did not testify.
John Alden father of the Claimant is present but did not testify.

Counsel to provide a summary of the petition and review the amounts indicated in the petition.
Guardian ad litem is called and confirms with the Court that the settlement amount is in the best interest of the claimant and understands that it is the only settlement claimant shall receive from the case.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $50,000.00 to be paid to Independent Life Company to fund the purchase of a structured settlement annuity for the benefit of the minor Simonne Alden.

A check in the amount of $50,000.00 will be paid by Defendants and/or their insurer to Structured Assignments, SCC(Tax ID#39-2077886) to fund the future periodic payments for the benefit of Simonne Alden, through an Annuity Policy issued by Independent Life AM Best.

Proposed order signed and executed this day.

Progress Report/Compliance of proof of funds purchasing the structured settlement annuity on calendar for April 12, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505
